steps: Log in to your Medusa Admin dashboard (typically at http://localhost:9000/app or your deployed admin URL)
Under the 'Developer' section, click 'Publishable API Keys'
Click 'Create API Key' in the top-right corner
Enter a title/name for the key (e.g., 'Storefront Production')
Copy the displayed publishable API key
Optionally add sales channels to scope the key's access to specific channels

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Publishable API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Medusa publishable API key. Sent in the 'x-publishable-api-key' request header for storefront API access.

notes: Medusa is self-hosted open-source software — there is no central hosted API at api.medusajs.com for production use
The 'publishable API key' is for storefront (public) access; admin operations require a separate admin token
Medusa Cloud (hosted) is available at cloud.medusajs.com as a managed option
The API key is not secret and can be used in frontend applications safely
You must have a running Medusa backend instance to use this API
Medusa v2 is the current major version — ensure your setup uses the v2 API paths

test_endpoint.description: List store products to verify the publishable API key is accepted
